query:
SELECT 
  p.id, 
  p.quotationNumber,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.advanceAmount,
  (p.totalAmount - p.advanceAmount) as saldoPendiente,
  p.estimatedInstallDate,
  DATEDIFF(NOW(), p.estimatedInstallDate) as diasVencido
FROM projects p
WHERE p.totalAmount > 0 
  AND p.advanceAmount > 0
  AND (p.totalAmount - p.advanceAmount) > 0
  AND p.estimatedInstallDate < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
LIMIT 5;
